data.title: Why Most US Fintech Startups Fail at Mobile Apps — And It's Not Because of the Code
data.description: Many U.S. fintech startups build mobile apps with clean code and flashy features, yet still struggle to gain traction. Why? Because technical execution isn't the real issue—trust, compliance, and user experience are. This article explores why even well-developed fintech apps fail, and how partnering with the right mobile app development company in USA can help startups bridge the gap between great code and real-world success.

data.title: Oracle Base Service Coming To Google Cloud With Global Expansion Plans
data.description: Oracle (ORCL) partners with Google Cloud (GOOG) to launch new partner program and Oracle Base Database Service. Service to expand to 11 new regions.

data.title: Sink Or Swim? Why This Week's Inflation Report Is Crucial For Markets
data.description: Market awaits March inflation report, hoping for lower CPI to support rate cuts amid trade uncertainty. Goldman Sachs predicts in-line results.

data.title: Cannabis Stays Legal In Germany Following New Coalition Deal
data.description: Germany's new government will keep cannabis legalization in place, with a neutral evaluation set for fall 2025.

data.title: Meta, IBM, Palo Alto Networks: Why Stephanie Link Is Doubling Down On These Tariff-Proof Tech Titans
data.description: As tariffs and trade war chatter send shivers down tech's spine, Stephanie Link of Hightower Advisors sees opportunity – especially in software and services names with recurring revenue and minimal exposure to global shocks.
